name: Adyen N.V.
confidenceReason: Europe's premier payments infrastructure company. Rule of 40 score of 77%. EBITDA margins above 50%. Virtually unlevered ($12.6B cash vs $248M debt). But 37x forward P/E is not cheap and beta 2.11 adds risk.
bullCase: Dominant position in unified commerce payments. Rule of 40 score of 77% is elite. Massive net cash position. Expanding into new geographies and verticals. Enterprise-grade moat with deep integrations.
bearCase: 37x forward P/E is not cheap. Growth has decelerated from the 30%+ era. Stock has been flat for a year. Competition from Stripe and PayPal. Higher beta (2.11).

cagrModel.basis: Post-bubble range 25-55x; base at mid-range, bear at current trailing PE
